title: Remove OTP from Registration and Replace with Internet Identity Authentication

requirements.text: Refactor the RegisterPage to a 2-step flow: Step 1 collects Display Name, Mobile Number, and BGMI Player ID with a Continue button; Step 2 shows an Internet Identity authentication prompt (using the existing useInternetIdentity hook) instead of OTP verification. Remove the entire OTP step (Step 2 'Verify OTP'), including the OTP input field, 'Demo OTP: 1234' banner, and all OTP generation/verification logic. The stepper UI should update to show only 2 steps: 'Details' and 'Done'.

quotes: otp hata do jab Internet Identity ka option hai to
display name, mobile no., bgmi player id Internet Identity ka option ana chahiye lekin display name mobile no. bgmi player id ye tino chij dalne ke baad main login internet Identity se hoga

acceptanceCriteria: Registration page shows only 2 steps in the stepper: 'Details' and 'Done'
Step 1 contains Display Name, Mobile Number, and BGMI Player ID fields with a Continue button
Step 2 shows an Internet Identity login button (no OTP input, no OTP banner)
Clicking the Internet Identity button triggers the Internet Identity authentication popup
After successful Internet Identity authentication, the player profile is registered on-chain using the authenticated identity
No 'Demo OTP: 1234' banner or OTP input field exists anywhere in the registration flow
The 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can register as a player' error no longer appears because Internet Identity is authenticated before the registerPlayer call is made

requirements.text: Update the backend registerPlayer function (or its authorization check in main.mo) to accept calls from Internet Identity-authenticated principals. Ensure that when a player registers after authenticating via Internet Identity, the caller's principal is treated as authenticated and registration succeeds without returning an 'Unauthorized' error.

quotes: Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can register as a player

acceptanceCriteria: A player authenticated via Internet Identity can successfully call registerPlayer without receiving an 'Unauthorized' error
Anonymous principal calls to registerPlayer are still rejected
Existing registered players are not affected

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not add any new OTP or SMS-based verification system
Preserve existing admin login flow — only player registration flow should be changed
nonGoals: Changing tournament registration or payment flow
